name: Incorrect Block Delimitation
description: The code does not explicitly delimit a block that is intended to contain multiple statements, causing only the first statement to be governed by the control structure while subsequent statements execute unconditionally. This can lead to security-critical code executing outside its intended conditional context.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node (if/else/loop) with a STRUCTURAL block that contains fewer statements than intended. Look for CONTROL→single statement where additional statements follow outside the block scope but appear to be logically related.
